overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic action game showing a samurai character running along a snowy coastal beach at twilight. The character moves from a torch-lit area past rocky outcrops and alongside a beached wooden boat, with ocean waves crashing nearby.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy beach near ceremonial torch structure

events.description: character transitions from standing to running along the shoreline

agents.ego_description: samurai character begins running along the snowy beach away from the torch structure, leaving footprints in the snow

entered.detail: tall wooden torch with bright orange flame on a pole, standing on the beach
snow-covered rocky outcrop with sparse vegetation
dark ocean water with white crashing waves along the shoreline
snow-covered sandy beach surface with visible footprints
jagged rocky islands and outcrops visible offshore in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a snowy coastal beach at blue hour, with a ceremonial torch burning brightly on the right. The samurai character begins running along the shoreline, leaving tracks in the snow. The ocean crashes on the left while rocky cliffs line the right side of the beach.

scene_state.functional_zone: open coastal beach approaching rock formations

events.description: ceremonial torch structure passes out of view behind the character
large rock outcrop and beached wooden boat come into view ahead on the left

agents.ego_description: character continues running along the open beach toward distant rock formations and the beached vessel

entered.detail: long wooden boat wrecked and resting on the snow-covered shore
tall snow-covered cliff face with pine trees beginning to appear on the left

segments.scene_description: The character runs along the open beach as the torch structure recedes behind. The beach curves, bringing the ocean from the left to the right side of the frame. A large beached wooden boat and coastal cliffs come into view ahead on the left as the character approaches.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow beach passage between cliff and ocean

events.description: character runs alongside the beached wooden boat, entering a narrower passage between cliff and water

agents.ego_description: character runs alongside the beached boat with ocean waves crashing nearby, moving through the narrow coastal passage

entered.detail: pine trees growing on the cliff edge extending over the beach

segments.scene_description: The character runs alongside the beached wooden boat in a narrower passage between the coastal cliff on the left and the ocean waves on the right. The cliff overhangs slightly with pine trees visible above, while the waves crash closer to the shore as the beach curves.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a snowy coastal beach that shifts from an open, torch-lit shoreline to a narrow passage beside a beached vessel. It begins with a samurai running past a brightly burning ceremonial torch, leaving tracks in the snow as the ocean crashes to the left and rocky cliffs line the right. As the torch recedes, the beach curves, causing the ocean to shift from the left to the right side of the frame while a large wooden boat and towering cliffs emerge ahead. The scene then tightens as the character runs alongside the beached boat, moving through a constrained space between the crashing waves and an overhanging cliff topped with pine trees.
